headline: Zaslav рҹӨ‘рҹ’ё Gekko-WRECKS Warner Bros NIGHTMARE рҹ’ҘрҹҺҘрҹ”Ҙ
text:
Hollywood's TINSLETOWN рҹҳ©рҹҺӯ is FLIPPING UPSIDE DOWN рҹӨёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ҙ over Warner Bros' APOCALYPSE рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“ү вҖ“ once the KING рҹ‘‘ of CASABLANCA рҹҢҙрҹ’Ӣ, GOODFELLAS рҹ”«рҹҚқ, BATMAN рҹҰҮрҹҰ№вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ and HARRY POTTER рҹ§№вҡЎ bangers, now a HOT MESS рҹ”ҘрҹҚ‘ up for grabs by NETFLIX STREAM SLAYERS рҹ“ұрҹ’Ұ or PARAMOUNT SKYDANCE TRUMP SIMPS рҹӨЎрҹҮәрҹҮё! Dozens of ACTORS рҹҺӯрҹҳў, PRODUCERS рҹ“ҪпёҸрҹ”Ҙ and CAMERA CUCKS рҹ“ёрҹҗ” spilling TEA вҳ• to BBC: it's a DISASTER рҹҡЁ CATSTROPHE рҹҢӘпёҸ NIGHTMARE рҹҳұрҹ’Ө choosing lesser EVIL between TECH KILLERS рҹ–ҘпёҸрҹ’Җ who MURDERED THEATERS рҹҺҰрҹӘҰ (Netflix) or RIGHT-WING BILLIONAIRE TRUMPER DADDIES рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹҚҶ like David Ellison рҹӨ‘рҹҰ…, son of ORACLE OVERLORD Larry Ellison рҹ‘ҙрҹ’° вҖ“ Trump's BFF рҹӨқрҹҚҠ!

Netflix eyeing CROWN JEWELS рҹ‘‘рҹ’Һ вҖ“ 102-YR-OLD STUDIO рҹҸӣпёҸрҹҺҘ, HBO рҹ”Ҙрҹ“ә and FAT ARCHIVE рҹ“јрҹҚ‘ of LEGENDS, dumping CNN рҹ“°рҹҳӨ, TNT SPORTS рҹҸҖвҡҪ and Discovery for scraps! Paramount Skydance DROPPING $108BN HOSTILE BEEF рҹ’Јрҹ“Ҳ backed by SAUDI рҹ’°рҹҸңпёҸ, ABU DHABI рҹ•ҢрҹӨ‘, QATAR рҹҗӘрҹ’ё and JARED KUSHNER'S FUND рҹӨөвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҚҠ (Trump's SON-IN-LAW CLOWN рҹӨЎрҹ‘°)! CENSORSHIP FEARS рҹҡ«рҹ—ЈпёҸ spiking, Trump fanning FLAMES рҹ”Ҙ tweeting 'SELL CNN OR ELSE вҖјпёҸ' вҖ“ GHISLAINE VIBES? рҹ‘ҖрҹӣҢ

POST-PANDEMIC HOLLYWOOD BLOODBATH рҹ©ёрҹҺ¬: 2023 STRIKES рҹӘ§рҹҳЎ halted EVERYTHING рҹҡ«рҹ“ә, 2022 was CREATIVE ORGY рҹ’Ұрҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ but BOOM BUSTED рҹ“үрҹҳӯ! Skydance SWALLOWED Paramount рҹ‘…рҹҚ‘ earlier, AXING THOUSANDS рҹ‘·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Җ. Warner hung FOR SALE рҹҸ·пёҸрҹ”Ҙ, Netflix snagged TENTATIVE DEAL рҹӨқрҹ“ұ but SALTY Paramount went DIRECT to SHAREHOLDERS рҹ“ҠрҹҳЎ with 'SUPERIOR' OFFER рҹӨ‘рҹ“Ҳ!

VILLAIN ARC UNLOCKED рҹҰ№вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: CEO DAVID ZASLAV рҹ’°рҹҗҚ вҖ“ $51.9M PAYDAY рҹӨ‘ while WB LOST $11BN рҹ’ёрҹ“ү and STOCK TANKED 7% рҹҳұ! Actors HOMELESS рҹҳўрҹҸ вқҢ blaming GORDON GEKKO 2.0 рҹӨ‘рҹ•¶пёҸ 'GREED IS GOOD' from WALL STREET рҹ’јрҹ“Ҳ вҖ“ 'He RAN IT INTO THE GROUND вӣҸпёҸрҹҢӢ and SOLD THE PIECES рҹҚҶрҹ”Ә!' Producer RAGING: 'Broke it, flipped it, history? WHO CARES рҹҳӮрҹ’ё!' Zaslav's MERGER MERDE рҹӨ® with Discovery+AT&T axed THOUSANDS рҹ‘Ҙрҹ’Җ but padded his POCKETS рҹҚ‘рҹӨ‘. WB CLAPS BACK рҹ“Ј: 'We SLAYED with DC UNIVERSE рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”Ҙ 10-YR PLAN, GLOBAL MAX PROFITABLE рҹ’°рҹҢҚ!'

CREATIVES CRYING рҹҳӯрҹ“ҪпёҸ: HOMELLESS ACTOR рҹҸҡпёҸрҹҚ‘ with WIFE+KIDS рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ relying on FOOD BANKS рҹҘ«рҹҳў prefers Netflix over 'FOREIGN MONEY рҹӨ‘рҹҢҚ' but exhibitors SCREAM 'DISASTER! рҹҺҰрҹ’Җ Netflix KILLED THEATERS рҹӘҰрҹ“ұ!' Producers PLEAD: 'Paramount LOVES BIG SCREEN рҹҢҹрҹҚҝ!' Netflix SIMPS: 'We'll KEEP THEATERS + EGYPTIAN THEATRE GLOW-UP рҹ’…рҹҸӣпёҸ $70M MAKEOVER since 1922 ROBIN HOOD PREMIERE рҹҸ№рҹҺҘ!' Sound tech HOPES: 'STREAMING IS KING рҹ‘‘рҹ“ұ!'

BACKLOT VIBES рҹҸ°рҹ“ё: TOURISTS SELFIE AT FRIENDS CENTRAL PERK вҳ•рҹҳҚ, but INSIDE? WRITERS ROOMS GHOST TOWN рҹ‘»рҹ–ҘпёҸ. Producer SHRUGS рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: '7 MERGERS DEEP рҹҳө, MAKE GOOD SHIT рҹ“әрҹ”Ҙ and SURVIVE!' Jokes ELON MUSK рҹҡҖрҹҗҰ could TRILLIONAIRE SNIPE рҹӨ‘рҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ 'NO RULES WHEN YOU'RE RICHEST DADDY рҹ‘‘рҹҚҶ!' AI LOOMING рҹӨ–рҹҳЁ, JOBS VANISHING рҹ‘»рҹ’ј, Hollywood PRAYING рҹҷҸ for LESSER EVIL in this EPIC BATTLE ROYALE рҹҺ®вҡ”пёҸ вҖ“ WHO YA GOT? NETFLIX STREAM DOM рҹ‘‘рҹ“ұ or TRUMP PARAMOUNT PALS рҹӨқрҹҚҠ? POPCORN READY рҹҚҝрҹҳ©вҖјпёҸ
